name: estate-drive-sync
description: Google Drive sync for the generic estate media libraries (Branscombe + Seafields). One shared OAuth callback carries the estate in the state param, so only a single new redirect URI is needed. Hemp Homes keeps its own Drive integration.

env_vars.name: GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID
env_vars.description: Google OAuth client ID. Already present for the Hemp Homes Drive sync.
env_vars.where: Google Cloud Console → APIs & Services → Credentials

env_vars.name: GOOGLE_CLIENT_SECRET
env_vars.description: Google OAuth client secret. Already present for the Hemp Homes Drive sync.
env_vars.where: Google Cloud Console → APIs & Services → Credentials

env_vars.name: NEXT_PUBLIC_CANONICAL_URL
env_vars.description: Canonical app URL, used to build the OAuth redirect URI. Already set.

external_setup.title: Add the estate Drive callback redirect URI to the Google OAuth client
external_setup.description: The generic estate Drive sync uses ONE shared callback (estate carried in the OAuth state). Until this redirect URI is on the OAuth client, Connect Drive fails with redirect_uri_mismatch.
steps: Open the OAuth 2.0 Client ID already used by the Hemp Homes Drive sync (the one matching GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID)
Under 'Authorised redirect URIs', click Add URI
Save. (The existing Hemp Homes URI .../api/admin/hemp-homes/drive/callback stays as-is.)
